title: E-commerce Product Price Analysis Dashboard

statement.markdown:
## Projects Challenge: E-commerce Product Price Analysis Dashboard

Your objective is to build a fully functional, highly interactive React component representing the target design mockup.

### 🎨 Color Palette
* `#B7D7CD`
* `#C06C88`
* `#411C56`

### 📐 Target Design Mockup
Use the visual mockup shown in the panel to guide your coordinate alignment, container proportions, and spacing.

### 📌 Target Design SVG Source
The target geometry is defined by the following SVG vector graphic (viewable by the LLM judge):
```xml
<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='400' height='300'>
<g transform='translate(50,50)'>
<rect x='0' y='0' width='300' height='250' fill='#090a0f' rx='10'/>
<path d='M 10 20 L 290 20' stroke='#411C56' stroke-width='5'/>
<path d='M 10 40 L 290 40' stroke='#411C56' stroke-width='5'/>
<text x='10' y='20' font-size='24' fill='#B7D7CD'>Product List</text>
<text x='10' y='50' font-size='18' fill='#C06C88'>Filter</text>
<g transform='translate(0,80)'><rect x='10' y='0' width='70' height='20'/><rect x='90' y='0' width='70' height='20'/></g>
<g transform='translate(0,120)'><rect x='10' y='0' width='70' height='20'/><rect x='90' y='0' width='70' height='20'/></g>
<g transform='translate(0,160)'><rect x='10' y='0' width='70' height='20'/><rect x='90' y='0' width='70' height='20'/></g>
<rect x='310' y='0' width='60' height='20'/><text x='320' y='10' font-size='18' fill='#B7D7CD'>Refresh</text>
</g>
</svg>
```

### ⚙️ Requirements
1. Match the visual presentation (layout, alignment, borders, colors) of the mockup.
2. Implement all necessary React state variables, event handlers, and input bindings to make the page interactive.
3. Make sure all interactive controls (buttons, forms, checkboxes, sliders) update the view correctly.

constraints: Must utilize the specified color palette
Must include a refresh button that updates the product list
Must display detailed product information upon clicking on a product

referenceAssets.caption: Recreate target design: E-commerce Product Price Analysis Dashboard

gradingCriteria.description: Evaluate how closely the layout, colors, and positioning match the target visual mockup.
Verify that the product list updates when the filter is changed, and that the refresh button updates the product list.
Review code cleaness, proper semantic elements, and efficient state use.
